title: Veterans Collaboration Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Economic Opportunity.
crs_summary: Veterans Collaboration Act This bill requires the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to implement a two-year pilot program to promote and encourage partnerships between the VA and nonprofit organizations and institutions of higher learning. Specifically, the VA must encourage partnerships between (1) veterans service organizations that provide credentialed personnel to assist veterans with legal needs, and (2) law schools that provide pro bono legal assistance and legal services to veterans.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Economic Opportunity.
